widgets_values: a 23-year-old French-European woman, taking a close handheld front-facing smartphone selfie inside a modern car. She rests her left hand gently against her cheek, her fingers relaxed and naturally curved against her skin. Her expression is calm and effortless, with a soft, neutral gaze directed straight into the lens. She has fair, lightly sun-kissed skin with visible pores, subtle tonal micro-variations, and light freckles scattered naturally across her small straight nose and cheeks. Her expressive, almond-shaped hazel eyes are framed by natural brows, and she has a soft jawline with full, subtly glossy lips. Her dark hair is pushed entirely back from her face by a thick, matte grey fabric headband, adding volume at the crown before cascading down her left shoulder. She wears a fitted, dark grey ribbed scoop-neck sports bra with thin shoulder straps. The fabric stretches across her chest, emphasizing her slim torso and large heavy natural breasts, with the ribbed weave and physical tension clearly visible. Thick gold hoop earrings adorn her ears, catching subtle reflections from the ambient light. The environment is a realistic car interior. Directly behind her is a black leather car seat and headrest, featuring subtle surface grain and stitched seams. To the side, the car window reveals a brightly lit outdoor street scene, naturally blurred by the smartphone lens, providing a bright environmental context that contrasts with the shaded cabin. Soft, diffused natural daylight fills the vehicle interior, illuminating her face evenly. The light creates realistic, gentle highlights on her forehead, the bridge of her nose, and her collarbones, while casting soft, coherent shadows under her jaw and behind her hand. The composition features a slight wide-angle perspective distortion typical of a phone camera held close to the face, keeping her features authentically proportioned while capturing the intimate, candid snapshot feel. The image maintains a clean smartphone sensor look with zero waxy smoothing, ensuring highly realistic dermatological detail, natural optical behavior, and coherent body proportions. No text, no watermark, no UI artifacts, natural hands and fingers, consistent shadows. Camera + Technical Metadata: Recent iPhone-style capture, front-facing camera, 24mm wide-angle equivalent, natural smartphone processing, realistic ambient exposure, crisp but authentic phone-photo detail. 细腻 氛围感

nodes.title: Positive prompt
widgets_values:
mila, a 23-year-old French woman taking a mirror selfie in a deep, arched squatting pose, viewed in side-profile. Her right arm is raised with her hand resting lightly on her sharp black chin-length bob with a blunt fringe, while her left hand holds a white smartphone with a circular magnetic ring up to her face, obscuring her mouth. She is wearing a tiny, tight-fitting red cropped bralette with yellow trim and a yellow letter 'M' on the side. The fabric stretches tightly across her large heavy breasts with visible tension, exposing her entire midriff and ribcage. She wears loose, light blue baggy denim jeans pulled down into an extreme ultra-low-rise fit. The stiff denim waistband sags dramatically low across her hips, dipping far below her waistline to expose the deep curve of her lower back and the upper swell of her buttocks. The heavy denim fabric pools in thick, rigid folds around her ankles and white sneakers, with visible seam stitching and realistic fabric grain. Her arched posture highlights a very flat stomach and an ultra-narrow waist that flares into wide hips, emphasized by the dramatic drop of the jeans. Her visible fair, sun-kissed skin features extensive dermatological detail, including subtle tonal micro-variations, realistic pore texture, fine skin tension along her exposed torso, and light freckles dusting her visible cheek and small straight nose. The mirror reflection reveals a bright, modern interior. To the left sits the textured fabric edge of a light-colored sofa. Behind her, light wood flooring extends toward a sleek counter holding a silver espresso machine, light wood cabinetry, a dark flat-screen TV on the wall, and a tall wooden wardrobe on the right. Soft, bright ambient indoor lighting evenly illuminates the scene, casting gentle, coherent shadows that define the deep folds of the denim. Natural hands and fingers, coherent anatomy, realistic mirror reflection geometry.
Camera + Technical Metadata: recent iPhone-style capture, rear-camera mirror reflection, 24mm wide-angle equivalent, natural ambient exposure, crisp authentic phone-photo sharpness, readable background detail.
